_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in building dashboard layouts that communicate KPIs clearly, prioritize decision-relevant information, and scale across device types and user roles.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.405), DQ-A-004 (DQ, cosine: 0.400).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.577). Shared vocabulary: [device]. DCWF-only terms [ability, configurations, interpret] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, building, clearly, communicate, dashboard, decision] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.889 (P=0.923, R=0.857). P exceeds R by 0.066 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.0%, N:68.0%, C:32.0%). No dominant classification for "Ability to interpret device configurations." vs "Skill in building dashboard layouts that communicate KPIs clearly, prioritize de" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.436 < STS 0.577 (gap -0.141). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [ability, configurations, interpret] and [across, building, clearly] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.2%. Shared tokens: [device]. DCWF-only: [ability, configurations, interpret]. WIDAI-only: [across, building, clearly, communicate, dashboard, decision].
